# About Our Team

![](images/clipboard-3121001102.jpeg)


```{=html}
<div id="myImageCarousel"
     class="carousel slide carousel-fade"
     data-bs-ride="carousel"
     data-bs-pause="hover">

  <div class="carousel-indicators">
    <button type="button" data-bs-target="#myImageCarousel" data-bs-slide-to="0" class="active"></button>
    <button type="button" data-bs-target="#myImageCarousel" data-bs-slide-to="1"></button>
    <button type="button" data-bs-target="#myImageCarousel" data-bs-slide-to="2"></button>
    <button type="button" data-bs-target="#myImageCarousel" data-bs-slide-to="3"></button>
    <button type="button" data-bs-target="#myImageCarousel" data-bs-slide-to="4"></button>
    <button type="button" data-bs-target="#myImageCarousel" data-bs-slide-to="5"></button>
    <button type="button" data-bs-target="#myImageCarousel" data-bs-slide-to="6"></button>
    <button type="button" data-bs-target="#myImageCarousel" data-bs-slide-to="7"></button>
    <button type="button" data-bs-target="#myImageCarousel" data-bs-slide-to="8"></button>
    <button type="button" data-bs-target="#myImageCarousel" data-bs-slide-to="9"></button>
  </div>

  <div class="carousel-inner" style="border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 18px 60px rgba(11,16,32,.18);">

    <div class="carousel-item active" data-bs-interval="2000">
      <img src="pic/pic9.jpg" class="d-block w-100" alt="Picture 9">
    </div>

    <div class="carousel-item" data-bs-interval="2000">
      <img src="pic/pic10.png" class="d-block w-100" alt="Picture 10">
    </div>

    <div class="carousel-item" data-bs-interval="2000">
      <img src="pic/pic11.png" class="d-block w-100" alt="Picture 11">
    </div>

    <div class="carousel-item" data-bs-interval="2000">
      <img src="pic/pic12.png" class="d-block w-100" alt="Picture 12">
    </div>

    <div class="carousel-item" data-bs-interval="2000">
      <img src="pic/pic13.jpg" class="d-block w-100" alt="Picture 13">
    </div>

    <div class="carousel-item" data-bs-interval="2000">
      <img src="pic/pic14.png" class="d-block w-100" alt="Picture 14">
    </div>

    <div class="carousel-item" data-bs-interval="2000">
      <img src="pic/pic15.jpg" class="d-block w-100" alt="Picture 15">
    </div>

    <div class="carousel-item" data-bs-interval="2000">
      <img src="pic/pic16.png" class="d-block w-100" alt="Picture 16">
    </div>

    <div class="carousel-item" data-bs-interval="2000">
      <img src="pic/pic17.jpg" class="d-block w-100" alt="Picture 17">
    </div>

    <div class="carousel-item" data-bs-interval="2000">
      <img src="pic/pic18.png" class="d-block w-100" alt="Picture 18">
    </div>

  </div>

  <button class="carousel-control-prev" type="button" data-bs-target="#myImageCarousel" data-bs-slide="prev">
    <span class="carousel-control-prev-icon"></span>
  </button>

  <button class="carousel-control-next" type="button" data-bs-target="#myImageCarousel" data-bs-slide="next">
    <span class="carousel-control-next-icon"></span>
  </button>

</div>
```












::: {data-aos="fade-up"}
# 🌌 Group 4: Astro-Tourism & Experience

Welcome to our official project website. We are a team of 8 enthusiasts dedicated to exploring the wonders of NARIT and sharing the beauty of the cosmos.
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🧑‍🚀 Member Gallery

::: {data-aos="zoom-in"}
Our team in action at NARIT.
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 📋 Member List

:::: {data-aos="fade-up"}
::: {data-aos="zoom-in"}
See the table below for a breakdown of our group members. Please note that student ID numbers are not displayed here to protect privacy.
:::

| Name              | Faculty | Role in Project |
|-------------------|---------|-----------------|
| CHENFEI LIU       | ICDI    | Video Editor    |
| YUEYU TIAN        | ICDI    | Web Developer   |
| SIYU WANG         | ICDI    | Content Writer  |
| XINYU ZHANG       | ICDI    | Photographer    |
| RONG WEN          | ICDI    | UX Designer     |
| RUITONG LI        | ICDI    | Researcher      |
| KITKWIN PHIANCHOB | ICDI    | Coordinator     |
| PEIYANG SONG      | ICDI    | Data Analyst    |
::::
